economic_notes: Kisemattawa Pimukamik Gas Bar operated as consolidated entity. Soil remediation projects underway. WTP and Water Main Distribution Upgrade Project in construction in progress.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to obtain assurance over existence and completeness of accounts payable and accrued liabilities. Financial statements dated January 30, 2024 for a March 31, 2021 year-end — significant delay in audit completion. Accounts payable and accrued liabilities are very high at $30.46M vs prior year $24.29M, with trade and other payables of $26.99M being the largest component. Construction in progress includes WTP and WM Distribution Upgrade Project ($7.17M) and Thunder Cloud House Project ($209K). Six entities consolidated including Education Authority, Health Authority, Housing Authority, Employment and Training, and Gas Bar. No schedule of remuneration disclosed.
